steps.title: Use the graph as a line
steps.content: The line shows combinations of pounds of tangerines and pounds of lemons that cost $18$ total. Each point on the line gives a matching pair.

steps.title: Read the matching value
steps.content: Melvin bought $4$ pounds of tangerines, so find $x=4$ on the graph and read the corresponding lemon value on the line. The graph gives $10$ pounds of lemons. The answer is B.
